metadata.description: German Freedom-of-Information intelligence skills powered by the fragdenstaat-cli (FragDenStaat.de / Froide read API)

plugins.name: fragdenstaat
plugins.description: Find and analyse FOI requests, look up the right authority, explore the German FOI legal landscape, and dig out and export released documents — all over the public, key-free FragDenStaat.de API via the fragdenstaat-cli.
